who actually does this

I've been producing AI-powered animated videos for YouTube and TikTok — mythology, history, storytelling. Every tool, prompt, and technique in this ebook comes from real production experience, not theory.

People started asking in the comments how I made my videos. This ebook is the honest, complete answer — everything I wish I had when I started.
